welcome.title: Welcome to Radzi
welcome.tagline: Track your walks and rides. Every journey counts.

profile.title: Set Up Your Profile
profile.photoPermissionBody: Photo library access was denied. You can continue without a profile photo.

fgLocation.title: Location Access
fgLocation.body: Radzi needs your location to map your routes and calculate distance.

bgLocation.title: Background Location
bgLocation.body: Allow Radzi to track your route even when the app is in the background.

motion.title: Motion & Activity
motion.body: Radzi uses motion data to automatically detect when you start walking or cycling.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.body: Get ride summaries, achievement alerts, and weekly goal reminders.

allSet.title: You're all set!
allSet.body: Ready to start your first activity?

banner.permissionMissing: Some permissions are missing. Tap to fix in Settings.
